ddls:
CREATE TABLE "establishments" (
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each establishment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the establishment */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the establishment */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the establishment */,
  "easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate for geolocation */,
  "northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate for geolocation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the establishment location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the establishment location */,
  "local_authority" TEXT /* Local authority overseeing the establishment */,
  "establishment_type" TEXT /* Type of establishment (e.g., pub, restaurant, cafe) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* JSON or text field for opening hours */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the establishment's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the establishment */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the establishment */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the establishment */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the establishment */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last health inspection */,
  "last_inspection_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the last health inspection */,
  "last_license_expiry" TEXT /* Date the last license expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fsa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local authority */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the local authority */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the local authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the local authority's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the local authority */,
  "establishment_count" INTEGER /* Number of establishments overseen by the local authority */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection conducted by the local authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the inspection (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspector_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the inspector */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, follow-up) */,
  "compliance_score" INTEGER /* Numeric score indicating compliance level (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_fsa_id FOREIGN KEY ("fsa_id") REFERENCES establishments ("fsa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., app, website) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_fsa_id FOREIGN KEY ("fsa_id") REFERENCES establishments ("fsa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reviewer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine (e.g., Italian, Indian) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine type */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region of origin for the cuisine */,
  "popular_dishes" TEXT /* JSON or text field for popular dishes of the cuisine */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of establishments offering this cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "establishment_cuisines" (
  "establishment_cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cuisine */,
  "menu_url" TEXT /* URL to the establishment's menu for the specific cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("establishment_cuisine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_cuisines_fsa_id FOREIGN KEY ("fsa_id") REFERENCES establishments ("fsa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_establishment_cuisines_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license record */,
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., alcohol, food service) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuing authority */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license (e.g., active, expired, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_fsa_id FOREIGN KEY ("fsa_id") REFERENCES establishments ("fsa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection associated */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review associated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., inspection summary, review summary) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* JSON or text field for detailed report information */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_fsa_id FOREIGN KEY ("fsa_id") REFERENCES establishments ("fsa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked as favorite */,
  "fsa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the establishment marked as favorite */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date when the establishment was marked as a favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_fsa_id FOREIGN KEY ("fsa_id") REFERENCES establishments ("fsa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the admin user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the admin user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the admin user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., superadmin, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
